title: MCP-A Error
description: Abstract, transport-independent error object as defined in SPEC §Error Model. Implementers MUST map the abstract `code` to the transport's native error encoding (see Canonical Transport Mappings). Clients SHOULD inspect the abstract `code` name rather than transport-specific numeric codes.

code.description: Named abstract error code from SPEC §Error Model. Exactly the canonical set.

detail.description: Optional implementation-defined context (e.g., which domain triggered FORBIDDEN, or which source triggered SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE).
